data.title: Extraction prompt templates for decisions, learnings, patterns, TODOs
data.description:
## Parent: #1

## Summary

Create prompt templates for each extraction type. Same pattern as the summary prompt, but targeting specific knowledge artifacts.

## Extraction Types

### 1\. Decisions

Extract agreed-upon decisions with reasoning and context.

```
- what was decided
- why (reasoning/tradeoffs)
- alternatives considered
- timestamp from conversation
```

### 2\. Learnings / Gotchas

Extract discoveries, debugging insights, "TIL" moments.

```
- what was learned
- context (what triggered the discovery)
- applicable projects/domains
```

### 3\. Patterns

Extract reusable patterns, conventions, or approaches that emerged.

```
- pattern name
- when to use
- example from conversation
```

### 4\. TODOs / Follow-ups

Extract explicit or implicit action items.

```
- what needs doing
- priority signal (if mentioned)
- related context
```

## Output Format

Structured markdown or JSON that downstream consumers can route to the right destination ([decisions.md](<http://decisions.md>), GitHub issues, knowledge/ files).

## Notes

* Prompts should be few-shot with real examples
* Keep prompts model-agnostic (work with ollama and claude -p)
* Consider conversation length — long convos may need chunking or pre-summary
